features.title: Secure access and refresh token flow
features.user_visible_behavior: Users stay signed in through a secure refresh-cookie flow without storing access tokens in localStorage.
verification: Manual: login, refresh tab, open second tab, logout
features.evidence: Server auth/security tests exist; client API client centralizes refresh/retry behavior.
features.notes: Keep delegated session flags separate from access token persistence.

features.title: Consistent validation for every write endpoint
features.user_visible_behavior: Invalid or unsafe request bodies are rejected consistently before controller logic.
verification: Add route-level Joi validation for write routes
features.evidence: Product create/update/delete routes now have route-level Joi validation and negative integration coverage.
features.notes: Invoices, metrics, groups, and programs still need a validation audit.

features.title: Authorize Socket.IO relayed events
features.user_visible_behavior: Only authorized users can join rooms or relay realtime workout/account updates.
verification: Add socket authorization checks before relaying events with client-provided IDs
Add tests or manual scripts for unauthorized socket attempts
features.notes: Room joins are checked; relayed event IDs need stronger server-side checks.

features.title: Decompose remaining large route files
features.user_visible_behavior: No user-visible behavior change; code becomes easier to modify safely.
verification: Manual route smoke tests for touched pages
features.notes: Next targets: Progress.jsx, WorkoutOverview.jsx, GroupDetail.jsx, SchedulePage.jsx.

features.title: Add client test foundation
features.user_visible_behavior: Regression risk drops for auth, schedule, workout, and billing flows.
features.notes: There is currently no client test script.
